page_title: GODZILLA vs. EVANGELION Mini Sofvi Chronicle
text:
is a line of toys produced by PLEX that was released in October 2025. The line was based on the GODZILLA vs EVANGELION collaboration. There are 6 regulars and 6 variantions in the line.
